_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in leveraging tools, system services, or utilities to laterally move to target systems.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing transformation roadmaps that sequence capability development logically, with dependencies identified, quick wins positioned early, and long-term structural changes sequenced appropriately.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-001 (OP, cosine: 0.503), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [laterally, leveraging, move, services, system, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriately, capability, changes, dependencies, designing, development] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.865, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.5%). "Skill in leveraging tools, system services, or utilities to laterally move to ta" and "Skill in designing transformation roadmaps that sequence capability development" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.526 ≈ STS 0.545 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [laterally, leveraging, move, services, system, systems]. WIDAI-only: [appropriately, capability, changes, dependencies, designing, development].
